title: Payment gateway timeout during checkout
description: Customers cannot complete purchases. Payment API returns 503 errors. All transactions failing since 9 AM. Revenue loss estimated at 50000 per hour.

title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: Application throwing connection pool exhausted errors during peak hours. 40% of API requests failing. Auto-recovers after traffic decreases.

title: SSL certificate expired on payment domain
description: Production SSL certificate expired. All HTTPS traffic to payment subdomain failing. Customers see security warnings.

title: User funds showing negative balance
description: Multiple users reporting negative account balances. Data integrity issue in transaction ledger. Affects approximately 200 accounts.

title: Duplicate charges on credit cards
description: Customers charged twice for single transactions. Payment retry logic creating duplicates. 47 cases identified totaling 12500 dollars.

title: Two-factor authentication not sending codes
description: SMS codes for 2FA not being delivered. Users locked out of accounts. Affects all users trying to login.

title: Wire transfer stuck in pending state
description: International wire transfers stuck in pending for over 48 hours. Funds neither credited nor returned. 15 transactions affected.

title: Account lockout after password reset
description: Users who reset password cannot login. Error says invalid credentials. Workaround is to reset password again.

title: Search functionality returning no results
description: Product search returns no results for valid queries. Category browsing still works as workaround.

title: Mobile app crashes on transaction history
description: iOS app crashes when viewing transaction history longer than 30 days. Android works fine.

title: Export to PDF missing transaction data
description: Monthly statement PDF export missing last 5 days of transactions. CSV export works correctly.

title: Push notifications delayed by hours
description: Transaction alerts arriving 2-3 hours after transaction. Real-time alerting broken.

title: Card activation failing for new cards
description: New card activation through app failing. Phone activation still works as workaround.

title: Scheduled payments executing twice
description: Some scheduled payments executing on both scheduled date and day after. Random occurrence.

title: Dashboard loading takes 30 seconds
description: Main dashboard takes 30 seconds to load. Users see blank screen with spinner. Other pages load normally.

title: Currency conversion showing wrong rates
description: Exchange rates displayed are 24 hours old. Actual transactions use correct rates.

title: Transaction categories assigned incorrectly
description: Auto-categorization putting restaurant charges in travel category. Manual recategorization works.

title: Date picker showing wrong month default
description: Date range picker defaults to previous month instead of current month.

title: Chart tooltips cut off on mobile
description: Spending chart tooltips extend beyond screen edge on mobile devices.

title: Filter dropdown not clearing properly
description: Transaction filters remain applied after clicking clear. Page refresh fixes issue.

title: Pagination showing incorrect total
description: Transaction list shows 100 total but only 87 transactions exist.

title: Sort by amount not working correctly
description: Sorting transactions by amount treats numbers as strings. 9 appears after 80.

title: Account nickname character limit unclear
description: Users not told about 20 character limit until after trying to save longer name.

title: Favicon not showing on Firefox
description: Bank favicon displays correctly on Chrome and Safari but not Firefox.

title: Loading spinner animation stutters
description: Loading animation has visible stutter on slower devices.

title: Copyright year shows 2023
description: Footer displays 2023 instead of 2024. Purely cosmetic issue.

title: Button hover color slightly off
description: Primary button hover state different shade than design spec.

title: Tooltip appears with delay
description: Help tooltips take 2 seconds to appear instead of instant.

title: Dark mode toggle animation janky
description: Dark mode transition has visible flicker during switch.

title: Profile picture crop tool imprecise
description: Image crop tool difficult to position precisely on mobile.

title: Recurring payment skip confirmation unclear
description: Skip payment confirmation modal text could be clearer.

title: Statement download filename generic
description: Downloaded statements named statement.pdf instead of including date.

title: Session timeout warning not shown
description: Users logged out without warning after 15 minutes idle.

title: Keyboard navigation broken in forms
description: Tab key skips over some form fields. Mouse click required.

title: Auto-logout during active typing
description: Session expires while user actively filling long form.

title: Beneficiary search case sensitive
description: Must match exact case when searching saved beneficiaries.

title: Transaction memo truncated in list
description: Long transaction memos cut off without indication of more text.

title: Print view missing header information
description: Printed statements missing account number and date range.

title: Accessibility contrast issues
description: Some text fails WCAG contrast requirements in light mode.

title: Screen reader skipping form labels
description: VoiceOver not reading labels for amount input fields.

title: Refresh token not extending session
description: Clicking refresh should extend session but does not work.

title: API rate limit message unhelpful
description: Rate limit error just says try again without indicating when.

title: Batch payment file format strict
description: Batch upload rejects files with extra whitespace in headers.

title: Notification preferences not saving
description: Email notification toggles reset after leaving settings page.

title: Transaction search date range limited
description: Cannot search transactions older than 12 months in app.

title: Help chat widget overlaps content
description: Support chat bubble covers important buttons on mobile.

title: Biometric login fails after app update
description: Face ID and fingerprint stop working until re-enrolled after updates.

title: Card freeze status sync delay
description: Frozen card status takes up to 5 minutes to reflect in app.

title: Investment portfolio chart wrong colors
description: Asset allocation pie chart colors dont match legend.

title: Dividend history missing recent entries
description: Last 3 dividend payments not showing in history tab.
